title: naphach #5301
definition:
1) to breathe, blow, sniff at, seethe, give up or lose (life)
    1a) (Qal) to breathe, blow
    1b) (Pual) to be blown
    1c) (Hiphil) to cause to breathe out
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to breathe, blow, sniff at, seethe, give up or lose (life)
    1a) (Qal) to breathe, blow
    1b) (Pual) to be blown
    1c) (Hiphil) to cause to breathe out

    NASB:  to breathe, blow
